message:
feat(tui): add responsive layouts and enhanced badge styling

Enhance TUI components with tier-aware layouts, additional badge types,
and improved mini-bar color semantics for better visual feedback.

Badge System Enhancements (internal/tui/styles/badges.go):

MedalPalette:
- New MedalPalette struct for consistent rank badge colors
- MedalColors() returns Gold/Silver/Bronze from theme
- RankBadge() refactored to use MedalPalette

MiniBar Color Bands:
- Add MidHigh color field for 4-tier granularity
- Low (green): <40% - healthy state
- Mid (blue): 40-59% - informational band
- MidHigh (yellow): 60-79% - warning band
- High (red): >=80% - critical state
- MiniBar() checks for MidHigh fallback to Mid
- DefaultMiniBarPalette() includes all 4 colors

Test Coverage (internal/tui/styles/badges_test.go):
- TestMiniBar verifying width consistency
- Custom palette with explicit MidHigh color
- Clamping tests for values above 1.0 and below 0.0
- TestRankBadge for ranks 1-4

Command Palette (internal/palette/model.go):

Tier-Aware Help Bar:
- TierWide+ adds "q/ctrl+c quit" hint
- TierUltra+ adds "Enter→ targets 1-4" and "type filter commands"
- Progressive disclosure based on available space
- Change "Esc" from "quit" to "back" for accuracy

Tutorial System (internal/tutorial/slides.go):

Responsive Content Width:
- effectiveWidth() returns tier-appropriate max widths
- TierUltra: 140 chars, TierWide: 120 chars, default: 90 chars
- Content centered within available space minus side panel

Side Panel for Wide Screens:
- renderSidePanel() shown at TierWide and above
- "QUICK REF" section with keyboard shortcuts
- "PROGRESS" section with slide completion status
- Uses gradient text for section headers
- Current slide marked with ●, completed with ✓, pending with ○
- Left border separates panel from main content

Slide Content Updates:
- Copy command description updated for new filter options
- Proper width calculation accounting for side panel space

This improves usability on wide terminals by providing contextual
help and progress tracking alongside tutorial content.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
